title: Nostalgic Adventure
description: A compilation of long-established mods coupled with mods that make the game feel like older versions of Minecraft such as Beta 1.7.3 and Release 1.12.2.
body:
![Nostalgic Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca356ff1591ab358c17d2747f62fa0730bc459c.png)

<hr>

### About this modpack

The Nostalgic Adventure modpack is a compilation of long-established mods coupled with mods that make the game feel like older versions of Minecraft such as Beta 1.7.3 and Release 1.12.2. The modpack achieves this thanks to [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks), a mod that restores most of the old Minecraft aspects such as combat and lighting, and the [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp), a resource pack that completes the look of the Programmer Art that is currently neglected by the developers of the game.

### What does this modpack have?

The modpack includes some mods you probably have played if you were in the Minecraft community during 2014-2015. If not, this modpack should help you understand how it was like. Want to get spoilered with what the modpack includes? Go ahead, open that spoiler. If not, download the modpack and experience it for yourself or with your friends :3


<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

> **Note**: the list only includes the major mods this mod adds. This modpack is based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop).
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2/) by [shartte](https://modrinth.com/user/shartte)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) by [Forstride](https://modrinth.com/user/Forstride)
- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) by [tropheusj](https://modrinth.com/user/tropheusj) (there are other extensions added to it)
- [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog) by [Lunar Eclipse Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/LunarEclipseStudios)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) by [mezz](https://modrinth.com/user/mezz)
- [OpenBlocks Elevator (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/openblocks-elevator-fabric) by [farrucho](https://modrinth.com/user/farrucho)
- [Notes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notes) by [Chaosyr](https://modrinth.com/user/Chaosyr)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) by [The Aether Team](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-aether-team)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones/) by [BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth)

</details>

### Can I help?

Yes, you can! You can suggest new mods, features and bug fixes in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/aPdMxGraAc). If you want to support me financially other than just downloading the modpack, you can donate to me directly on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/lightyisreal). It would greatly help me out!
